title: Transfer Console Tabs
concept: A responsive tabbed operations console that treats browser save, local directory save, GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions as one transfer deck while keeping the live WordPress shell protected.
focus: Blueprint replacement with validation and warning
saved, local, and temporary storage consequences
flows: Finish Save in this browser from an unsaved state with destination choice, file-copy progress, saved-row insertion, active title and slug update, storage badge mutation, transfer history, and reset action changing to Save & Reload.
Save to a local directory as a distinct destination with folder permission language, sync progress, local identity, saved-row insertion, transfer history, and reconnect consequences.

Select a Blueprint from a labeled representative subset of the 43-entry gallery, inspect JSON, validate, warn about replacing current content, confirm, run progress, and update preview, path, database size, and transfer history.
Use transfer cards for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, Blueprint copy/download/run, and current package history.
Manage saved, local, and temporary Playgrounds with open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, and active fallback when needed.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and file editor dirty/save states.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Local-directory storage distinction and reconnect consequence
Open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete final state, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory state badges
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset Playground and stored Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy, download bundle, run, replacement warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice and warning states
GitHub import and Export to GitHub
ZIP import and Download as zip
Database download and Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history for saves, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, deletes, settings reloads, and Blueprint runs
